_comment: Shared pool of icebreaker / community-building prompts, drawn from the
retired LCS decks. Deliberately NOT per-lecture: none of these are
topic-specific, and they get reused across lectures and terms, so one
pool avoids duplicating them. A deck slide of type 'icebreaker' names
one by id; leaving the id off picks one at random.
This is durable content (git-tracked, edited at leisure). The things you
rewrite minutes before class - today's announcements, which prompt you
actually want - are session-level and do not belong in this file.

icebreakers.prompt: If you could use a time machine, would you travel to the future or to the past? When, and where would you go?
What weird food combinations do you really enjoy?
What is the best gift you've ever given or received?

icebreakers.title: Meet your team
icebreakers.prompt: Please go around and introduce yourselves: your name, your class year and (intended) major, and the best gift you've ever given or received.
icebreakers.note: Then brainstorm a team name and enter it below.

icebreakers.title: Three things in common
icebreakers.prompt: As a team, find three interesting things you all have in common.
icebreakers.note: Put those three things in the answer box along with your team name — the LFs will vote on the winning team!
